code: import React from'react';import{Link,useLocation}from'react-router-dom';import{Music,Upload,Library,BarChart3}from'lucide-react';import'./Header.css';import{jsx as _jsx,jsxs as _jsxs}from"react/jsx-runtime";const Header=()=>{const location=useLocation();const navItems=[{path:'/',label:'Recognize',icon:Music},{path:'/upload',label:'Upload',icon:Upload},{path:'/library',label:'Library',icon:Library},{path:'/stats',label:'Stats',icon:BarChart3}];return/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("header",{className:"header",children:/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{className:"header-container",children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs(Link,{to:"/",className:"logo",children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx(Music,{className:"logo-icon"}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("span",{className:"logo-text",children:"Shazam Clone"})]}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("nav",{className:"nav",children:navItems.map(_ref=>{let{path,label,icon:Icon}=_ref;return/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs(Link,{to:path,className:"nav-link ".concat(location.pathname===path?'active':''),children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx(Icon,{className:"nav-icon"}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("span",{className:"nav-text",children:label})]},path);})})]})});};export default Header;
